title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">1️⃣</font> Skill Check Challenge – Compete
content:
1️⃣ Skill Check Challenge – Compete in a set of challenges (writing, rhetoric, strategy).
2️⃣ Faction Vote – A faction-wide vote can replace the leader (if 70% agree).
3️⃣ Exile Challenge – A player can remove the leader but must sacrifice their XP or an item.

✔ Leader Buffs & Risks:
• Leaders gain extra control over faction decisions.
• If a leader becomes too powerful, chaos events may target them.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Gives faction members a reason to stay engaged.
✔ Prevents stagnant faction leadership.
✔ Ties leadership roles to both gameplay and academic performance.

📜 4. Sudden vs. Predictable Chaos Events

📜 Chaos should be a mix of player-triggered and randomly occurring events.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 494 (chunk 494/555)
